knowledge_atoms.text:
And does it not seem hard to you,
When all the sky is clear and blue,

Bed in Summer
by Robert Louis Stevenson
Hi, Oliver. This is Wu Binbin. Are you free this ...?

Hi, Sarah!
It is autumn in April here in Sydney. Autumn is my favourite season! It is warm in the day and cool at night. Many people visit us in autumn because they like the weather.
When you come, you can visit the Sydney Opera House. It is the most famous building in Australia.
What is the weather like in April in your city?
What do you often do?
All the best,
Stella

I have to go to bed and see
The birds still hopping on the tree,
I usually get up at 6:00 a.m.

In summer, quite the other way,
I have to go to bed by day.

In winter I get up at night
And dress by yellow candlelight.
It is Saturday morning. Sarah is calling her friends. Listen and write the names.
Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?

Or hear the grown-up people's feet
Still going past me in the street.
Practice making plans over the phone.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 练习通过电话制定计划。

knowledge_atoms.text: When do you get up, Mum?
When do you go to bed, then?
When do you go to work?
Wow! When do you eat lunch?
Yes, I'm a doctor. I often work at night.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Recycle 1 - Sarah's weekend. 一个角色扮演活动，鼓励学生打电话给朋友，商量和计划周末的活动。页面提供了对话开场白和活动建议词库。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word go shopping?
Can you say: Practice making plans over the phone.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Recycle 1 - Daily Timetables. 一个角色扮演活动。学生需要先调查并填写自己父母的时间表，然后和同伴一起，模拟孩子和机器人询问父母作息时间的场景。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: When do you get up, Mum?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Recycle 1 - Seasons and Weather. 莎拉计划四月去悉尼旅行，她向朋友斯特拉询问天气情况。这是斯特拉的回信，信中解释了悉尼四月是秋天，并描述了天气和推荐的景点。
entry_probe_questions:
Can you say: Hi, Sarah!
It is autumn in April here in Sydney. Autumn is my favourite season! It is warm in the day and cool at night. Many people visit us in autumn because they like the weather.
When you come, you can visit the Sydney Opera House. It is the most famous building in Australia.
What is the weather like in April in your city?
What do you often do?
All the best,
Stella

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Recycle 1 - Poetry Reading. 莎拉正在读一首罗伯特·路易斯·史蒂文森的诗《夏日入眠》。这首诗描绘了孩子在冬夜起床和夏日白天上床睡觉的不同体验，表达了夏天天长夜短、想多玩一会儿的心情。
entry_probe_questions:
Can you say: Bed in Summer
by Robert Louis Stevenson

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听一段莎拉打电话给朋友们的录音，根据对话内容，将朋友的名字填写到对应的活动图片上。 Key patterns: It is Saturday morning. Sarah is calling her friends. Listen and write the names.
core_patterns: It is Saturday morning. Sarah is calling her friends. Listen and write the names.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: It is Saturday morning. Sarah is calling her friends. Listen and write the names.
return_anchors: It is Saturday morning. Sarah is calling her friends. Listen and write the names.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.

core_patterns: Practice making plans over the phone.
Are you free this...?
Hi, Oliver. This is Wu Binbin. Are you free this ...?
Hello.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word go shopping?
Can you say: Practice making plans over the phone.
branchable_topics: Call your friends and plan your weekend.
return_anchors: Practice making plans over the phone.
Hi, Oliver. This is Wu Binbin. Are you free this ...?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 机器人罗宾和莎拉的爸爸在周日早上对话。学生需要根据旁边提示的时间表，阅读对话并补全莎拉爸爸的回答。 Key patterns: Do you work at night?; When do you go to bed, then?
core_patterns: Do you work at night?
When do you go to bed, then?
Wow! When do you eat lunch?
When do you eat dinner?
When do you go to work?
Yes, I'm a doctor. I often work at night.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word 6:00 p.m. go to work?
Can you say: Do you work at night?
return_anchors: When do you go to bed, then?
Wow! When do you eat lunch?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个角色扮演活动。学生需要先调查并填写自己父母的时间表，然后和同伴一起，模拟孩子和机器人询问父母作息时间的场景。 Key patterns: When do you get up, Mum?; When do you cook breakfast?
core_patterns: When do you get up, Mum?
When do you cook breakfast?
I usually get up at 6:00 a.m.
At ...
allowed_answer_scope: I usually get up at 6:00 a.m.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: When do you get up, Mum?
branchable_topics: Find out your parents' timetables and role-play with your partner.
return_anchors: When do you get up, Mum?
I usually get up at 6:00 a.m.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary:

It is autumn in April here in Sydney. Autumn is my favourite season! It is warm in the day and cool at night. Many people visit us in autumn because they like the weather.
When you come, you can visit the Sydney Opera House. It is the most famous building in Australia.
What is the weather like in April in your city?
What do you often do?
All the best,
Stella

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据斯特拉的邮件内容，回答两个关于悉尼四月天气和季节的问题。 Key patterns: Read and answer.
core_patterns: Read and answer.
allowed_answer_scope: No, it isn't. It is autumn.
It is warm in the day and cool at night.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Read and answer.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the writing prompt activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一项写作任务，要求学生扮演莎拉，回复斯特拉的邮件。邮件模板已经给出，学生需要根据旁边的提示（春季天气如何？你通常做什么？）来补充邮件内容。 Key patterns: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?
core_patterns: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?
allowed_answer_scope: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?
branchable_topics: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?
return_anchors: Now can you answer the email for Sarah, please?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice match activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个语音辨析和拼写练习。学生需要在诗中找出与表格中单词押韵或发音相似的词。 Key patterns: Can you write more words?

branchable_topics: Find "friends" in the poem for the words below.
